scripts.build: bun run gen-version && bun run build:server && bun run build:client
scripts.build:server: bun run build:web && bun run build:concentrator && bun run build:cli
scripts.build:client: bun run build:wrapper && bun run build:agent
scripts.build:web: bun run gen-version && cd web && bun run build
scripts.build:web:debug: bun run gen-version && cd web && bun run build:debug
scripts.build:wrapper: bun run gen-version && bun build src/wrapper/index.ts --compile --minify --outfile bin/rclaude
scripts.deploy: bun run build:web && bun run build:concentrator && docker compose build --no-cache && docker compose up -d
scripts.deploy:docker: bun run build:web && bun run build:concentrator && docker compose up -d --build
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit && cd web && bun run typecheck
scripts.install-cli: bun install && cd web && bun install && cd .. && bun run build && mkdir -p ~/.local/bin && ln -sf "$(pwd)/bin/rclaude" ~/.local/bin/rclaude && ln -sf "$(pwd)/bin/concentrator" ~/.local/bin/concentrator && ln -sf "$(pwd)/bin/concentrator-cli" ~/.local/bin/concentrator-cli && ln -sf "$(pwd)/bin/rclaude-agent" ~/.local/bin/rclaude-agent && ln -sf "$(pwd)/scripts/revive-session.sh" ~/.local/bin/revive-session.sh && echo 'Symlinked rclaude, concentrator, concentrator-cli, rclaude-agent, and revive-session.sh to ~/.local/bin'
